title: Require Service Module Isolation
forbids: a root module edge outside exact contract/router imports, a root module re-export, a module import or re-export containing a parent segment outside the exact service-spine exception, or a current-owner sibling-module alias edge
why: One canonical import surface makes module ownership visible without path normalization or depth arithmetic: local ./ paths stay local, root facts use the owner alias, and siblings remain closed.
remediate: Keep exact root contract/router imports. Inside modules, remove every parent-segment source except import { service } from "../../impl" in module.ts; use the current-owner alias for other root/shared facts and same-module deep imports. Move sibling collaboration behind the root service capability.
message: Service modules must use the canonical import surface and remain closed to sibling implementation.
